## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.11

### 🎥 Cameras
- Rolls up the recent camera/WebRTC and HLS recording playback updates from the 1.4.10 prerelease series into the main release channel.
- Keeps cached recordings on the HLS playback path and leaves the old MP4 bridge out of the active playback flow.

### 🧯 Alarms
- Keeps the recent mute, self-test reporting, SBS50 child-device, and smoke/CO entity fixes available to users on the main release channel.

### ⌨️ Keypads
- Adds a bundled SKP0A keypad-code automation blueprint for using submitted keypad codes in Home Assistant automations.

### 🔄 Reloading
- Improves Home Assistant config-entry reload support by unloading delayed startup listeners and pending recording-cache notification tasks when the integration unloads.
